symptoms: High vibration at 1x RPM, elevated bearing temperature, axial movement
resolution: Replace drive-end bearing, re-grease, check alignment

symptoms: Broadband vibration, cavitation noise, fluctuating discharge pressure
root_cause: Cavitation due to low suction pressure
resolution: Restore NPSH, clean suction strainer, check valve position

symptoms: Vibration at 2x line frequency, uneven air gap, overheating
resolution: Rewind stator, megger test, improve cooling airflow

symptoms: High vibration at running speed, soft foot detected
resolution: Balance rotor, torque foundation bolts, shim soft foot

symptoms: Rising discharge temperature, vibration increase, oil carryover
resolution: Replace separator element, change oil and filters

symptoms: Knocking noise, high vibration at bearing frequency, metal in oil
1x RPM vibration, dust accumulation on blades
resolution: Clean impeller, re-balance, inspect blade erosion

symptoms: Gear mesh frequency sidebands, temperature rise, audible whine
resolution: Inspect gear set, replace worn gears, change lubricant

symptoms: High vibration at bearing defect frequencies, oil contamination
resolution: Replace input bearing, flush housing, refill lubricant

symptoms: Vibration at vane pass frequency, pressure pulsation
resolution: Replace wear rings, restore clearance to spec
